assert_RouteMethodUppercase.condition:

assert_DeduplicatedResults.condition:
\A ep1 in entry_points :
    \A ep2 in entry_points :

         ep1.function_name = ep2.function_name)
        implies ep1 = ep2

assert_AllEntryTypesValid.description: Test assertion for AllEntryTypesValid from JSTSEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_LibraryPublicApiAtCompletion.condition:
(phase = "complete" and codebase_type = "library")
    implies
    \A s in PublicTopLevelSkeletons :
        \E ep in entry_points :
            ep.file_path     = s.file_path     and
            ep.function_name = s.function_name and
            ep.entry_type    = "PUBLIC_API"

assert_PkgJsonCliOnlyWhenPresent.condition:
\A ep in entry_points :
        (ep.entry_type = "CLI_COMMAND" and ep.function_name = "mycli")
        implies (has_pkg_json and pkg_json_valid)
assert_PkgJsonCliOnlyWhenPresent.message:
Assertion failed: PkgJsonCliOnlyWhenPresent — \A ep \in entry_points :

assert_FallbackOnlyWhenNoEntries.condition:
(phase = "complete" and
     ~has_http_routes and
     ~has_cli_cmds and
     ~(has_pkg_json and pkg_json_valid) and
     codebase_type # "library")
    implies
    \A s in PublicTopLevelSkeletons :
        \E ep in entry_points :
            ep.file_path     = s.file_path     and
            ep.function_name = s.function_name and
            ep.entry_type    = "PUBLIC_API"
assert_FallbackOnlyWhenNoEntries.description: Test assertion for FallbackOnlyWhenNoEntries from JSTSEntryPointDiscovery spec

assert_AllInvariantsHold.condition:
and ValidPhase
    and NodeModulesExcluded
    and MinJsExcluded
    and DtsProducesNoEntries
    and RouteMethodUppercase
    and DeduplicatedResults
    and AllEntryTypesValid
    and LibraryPublicApiAtCompletion
    and PkgJsonCliOnlyWhenPresent
    and FallbackOnlyWhenNoEntries
